headline: Southern Company Joins President Trump's Ratepayer Protection Pledge, Reinforcing Customer-First Approach to Powering Growth
summary: Southern Company (NYSE: SO) announced it is joining President Donald Trump's Ratepayer Protection Pledge, underscoring the company's commitment to ensuring that America's leadership in artificial intelligence (AI) and advanced technologies delivers broad-based benefits for customers and communities.

headline: Turn The VST Shares You Own Into A 16% Income Stream
summary: Here is a way to get paid a meaningful income now on your Vistra shares, cash you keep no matter what, in exchange for capping your gains above a higher price.

headline: Vinson & Elkins Advises Georgia Power in 3.2GW OpenAI Data Center
summary: By Daniella Parra Vinson & Elkins said it advised Southern Company (NYSE: SO) and Georgia Power on agreements to provide up to 3.2 GW of power to OpenAI’s planned data center in Effingham County, Georgia. The project is expected to create thousands of jobs and billions in local investment and under the 25-year agreement, OpenAI […] The post Vinson & Elkins Advises Georgia Power in 3.2GW OpenAI Data Center appeared first on CorpGov.

headline: Here Are Thursday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: AT&T, Applied Digital, Autodesk, Duke Energy, Exxon Mobil, JPMorgan Chase & Company, Live Nation Entertainment, and More
summary: Rising oil prices, geopolitical tension, and a post-earnings stumble from a tech giant are rattling markets this morning, and Wall Street analysts are already reshuffling their ratings on some of the biggest names in energy, finance, and entertainment.
